title: Brunson Impact Forecaster
lede: Forecasts Jalen Brunson's likely scoring band for the upcoming match and maps it to historical Knicks win outcomes.

sections.title: Forecast Logic
sections.description: The variables factored into today's projected scoring band.

sections.title: Historical Impact by Scoring Tier
sections.description: How the Knicks' win likelihood shifts based on Brunson's output.

sections.title: Recent Form Baseline
sections.description: Brunson's scoring totals over the preceding 10 fixtures.

demoSteps: View the projected scoring band in the highlights to see what is expected for the next match.
Review the Forecast Logic list to understand exactly how the projected band was calculated.
Check the Historical Impact table to see the team's historical win rate when Brunson lands in or above that band.
Scroll down to the Recent Form Baseline to verify the 10-game performance trend supporting the forecast.
notes: All stats and historical records are illustrative for the V1 demo and should be powered entirely by local JSON fixtures.
Ensure UK spelling is used throughout the user interface (e.g., 'defence', 'analyse', 'favourable').
Do not present the win rate as a guaranteed prediction; maintain the framing of 'historical likelihood'.
If the extracted fixtures array is empty, populate the demo with illustrative data matching the 28-32 point band logic.
